title: Filing KPI Extraction Schema
description: JSON schema passed to ai_extract for one 10-K filing. Drives the structured columns of gold_filing_kpis.

company_name.description: Issuing company legal name from the cover page.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year covered by the filing.

revenue.description: Total revenue in USD for the fiscal year. From Statements of Operations.

ebitda.description: EBITDA in USD if disclosed; null otherwise.

top_risks.description: Top risk factors disclosed, ranked by prominence in the Risk Factors section.
